hero.tagline: Otu pịa ka ịchọta egwuregwu gị na-esote.
hero.download: Budata ngwa ahụ (na-abịa n'oge na-adịghị anya)

roles.heading: Otu ngwa maka onye ọ bụla
roles.subheading: Ma ị chọrọ naanị ilele, sonyere egwuregwu, ma ọ bụ chịa ihe niile – Footeee ejirila gị.

guest.title: Ọbịa
guest.description: Lelee ihe ụtọ bọọlụ anyị n'oge ezumike gị.
guest.longDescription: Lelee egwuregwu niile na-abịa, hụ nkọwa ebe a na-egwu egwu, ma lelee ndị egwuregwu dị – nke niile n'enweghị akaụntụ. Ọ dị mma maka ndị na-enwe mmasị.

player.title: Onye egwuregwu
player.description: Mbata gị na mbara egwuregwu nọ naanị nkeji ole na ole!
player.longDescription: Sonyere egwuregwu site n'otu pịa, hụ ndị ọzọ na-egwu, ma nata ozi mgbe ọnọdụ meghere ma ọ bụ mgbe egwuregwu na-achọ ịmalite.

manager.title: Onye njikwa
manager.description: Hapụ Footeee ka ọ lekọta ụwa bọọlụ gị!
manager.longDescription: Njikwa zuru oke n'egwuregwu, ndị otu, na ndị egwuregwu. Mepụta egwuregwu, kenye ndị otu, soro nleta, ma jikwaa obodo bọọlụ gị.

privacy.title: Amụma Nzuzo
privacy.intro: Footeee ("anyị") na-arụ ọrụ ngwa ekwentị Footeee ("Ngwa") na webụsaịtị a. Amụma Nzuzo a na-akọwa otu anyị si anakọta, jiri, kọsaa, ma chekwaa ozi gị mgbe ị na-eji Ngwa ahụ na ọrụ ndị metụtara ya.
privacy.section1Intro: Anyị nwere ike ịnakọta ụdị ozi ndị a:
privacy.section1Item1: Ozi akaụntụ (dịka ọmụmaatụ, aha, adreesị email, nzere nbanye n'ụdị echekwara).
privacy.section1Item2: Ozi ojiji ngwa (dịka ọmụmaatụ, egwuregwu ị mepụtara/sonyeere, ndị otu, ebe egwuregwu, na mmekọrịta).
privacy.section1Item3: Data ngwaọrụ/teknụzụ (dịka ọmụmaatụ, ụdị ngwaọrụ, ụdị OS, ụdị ngwa, nyocha).
privacy.section2Title: 2. Otu anyị si eji ozi gị
privacy.section2Item1: Iji mepụta ma jikwaa akaụntụ gị.
privacy.section2Item2: Iji nye njirimara bụ isi dịka ịmepụta egwuregwu, ịsonyere, na njikwa ndị otu.
privacy.section2Item3: Iji nye nkwado ma zaa arịrịọ.
privacy.section2Item4: Iji melite ntụkwasị obi, arụmọrụ, na ahụmịhe onye ọrụ.
privacy.section2Item5: Iji chekwaa nchekwa na ezi omume nke ọrụ anyị.
privacy.section2NoSell: Anyị anaghị ere ozi nkeonwe gị.
privacy.section3Text: Anyị nwere ike ịkekọrịta ozi naanị dịka ọ dị mkpa iji rụọ ọrụ, mee ka iwu kwụọ ọtọ, ma ọ bụ chekwaa ikike na nchekwa. Dịka ọmụmaatụ, anyị nwere ike iji ndị na-enye ụlọ ọrụ (ịkwado, email, dg.) ndị na-ahazi data n'aha anyị n'okpuru nchekwa kwesịrị ekwesị.
privacy.section4Text: Anyị na-eji usoro teknụzụ na nhazi kwesịrị ekwesị ichekwa ozi gị (dịka ọmụmaatụ, HTTPS, njikwa ohere). Ọ nweghị ụzọ nzipu ma ọ bụ nchekwa nke kwesịrị ntụkwasị obi 100%, yabụ anyị enweghị ike ikwe nkwa nchekwa zuru oke.
privacy.section5Text: Anyị na-edobe ozi nkeonwe oge niile dịka ọ dị mkpa iji nye ọrụ na maka ebumnuche azụmaahịa ziri ezi (dịka ọmụmaatụ, ndebe iwu, nchekwa, idozi esemokwu), ma ọ bụrụ na iwu achọghị oge idobe ogologo karịa.
privacy.section6Text: Dabere na ebe ị nọ (gụnyere UK/EU), ị nwere ike inwe ikike ịnweta, idozi, ihichapụ, ma ọ bụ gbochie nhazi nke data nkeonwe gị, yana ịrịọ mbufe. Iji mejupụta ikike ndị a, kpọtụrụ anyị.
privacy.section7Text: Footeee adịghị maka ụmụaka na-erughị afọ 13. Anyị amaghị na anyị na-anakọta ozi nkeonwe sitere n'aka ụmụaka na-erughị afọ 13.
privacy.section8Text: Anyị nwere ike melite amụma a site n'oge ruo n'oge. A ga-etinye mmelite na peeji a na ụbọchị "Emelitere ikpeazụ" a gbanwere.

deleteData.title: Hichapụ Data M
deleteData.description: Ị nwere ikike ịrịọ ka ehichapụ akaụntụ gị na data nkeonwe metụtara ya. Anyị na-ahazi arịrịọ n'ime ụbọchị 30.
deleteData.successMessage: Edoziri arịrịọ gị. Biko zipu email ahụ mepere na ngwa email gị. Anyị ga-ahazi ya n'ime ụbọchị 30.
deleteData.scopeLabel: Gịnị ka ị chọrọ ka ehichapụ?
deleteData.scopeFull: Ihe niile — hichapụ akaụntụ m na data niile
deleteData.scopeData: Data naanị — debe akaụntụ mana hichapụ data ọrụ
deleteData.confirmLabel: Aghọtara m na omume a enweghị ike ịlaghachi azụ.
deleteData.emailRequired: Biko tinye email jikọtara na akaụntụ gị.
deleteData.scopeFullLabel: Nhichapụ akaụntụ zuru oke + data niile

common.download: Budata ngwa ahụ (na-abịa n'oge na-adịghị anya)
